narrative:
Precinct Athalia (precinct in Lawrence County) has 161 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.2 percentage points.
